description_long: This is a commercial-grade espresso coffee machine with a robust rectangular body, predominantly finished in teal with metallic accents. The front features two group heads, each with a portafilter, a drip tray below, and a row of round control buttons above, flanked by indicator lights. The top surface is flat and likely used for cup storage, bordered by a metallic rail. The sides are smooth and teal, with the right side showing protruding handles and knobs for steam and hot water. The back is a solid, dark metallic panel with no visible controls or branding. The machine's overall design is modern and functional, suitable for cafes or urban coffee shops.
description: A teal and metallic commercial espresso coffee machine with dual group heads, control buttons, and a flat top for cup storage. It features a modern, robust design ideal for urban cafes.
description_view_0: Front view showing two group heads with portafilters, a drip tray, control buttons, indicator lights, and the brand logo.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth teal panel and the machine's depth, with no visible controls.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, dark metallic back panel with no visible features or branding.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the protruding handles and knobs for steam and hot water, as well as the teal side panel.
attribute_brand_logo: A logo reading 'BRICAFE' is visible on the lower right of the front panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel features two rows of round buttons above each group head, with indicator lights on the right side and rotary knobs below.
